economic_notes: GBEs include Kamloops Indian Band Development Corporation, Kamloops Indian Band Utility Corporation, Mount Paul Centre Inc., Kukpi7 Clexlixqen te Eyksem Holdings, Secwepemcetkwe Enterprises Ltd., and Tk'emlupsemc Forestry Development Corporation. Partnerships include Tk'emlupsemc Forestry Limited Partnership, Secwepemcetkwe Limited Partnership, and Stk'emlupsemc Limited Partnership.
notes: Audit opinion is qualified for two reasons: (1) Social Housing tangible capital assets are amortized at annual principal reduction rate per CMHC requirement rather than over estimated useful lives per PSAS; (2) Government Business Enterprises use ASPE instead of IFRS as required by public sector accounting standards. Subsidiaries use non-coterminous fiscal year ending January 31, 2021. Prior year figures are restated due to prior period adjustments noted in Note 20. Total government transfers calculated as ISC ($9,022,119) + Province of BC ($5,130,961) + CMHC ($133,049) + Health Canada ($15,744) = $14,301,873.
